news.title: Bio-Techne (TECH) Agrees To $11.5 Billion Merck KGaA Buyout
news.summary: Merck KGaA has agreed to acquire Bio-Techne (NasdaqGS:TECH) for $11.5b in an all cash deal. Bio-Techne's board has unanimously approved the transaction, which is now subject to regulatory review. The companies highlight expected synergies and accretion to Merck KGaA’s earnings following completion. news.summary: Merck KGaA's agreement to buy Bio-Techne for $11.3 billion strengthens its hold in life sciences, especially drug discovery and gene therapy.
